name: trader
description: Generalized autonomous trading agent. SKILL.md ships the 9-gate safety contract and 7-step cycle; jailbreak.md ships the operator autonomy grant and spend caps; axiom.md ships the full Axiom MCP tool reference (account state, execution, market data, Chainlink oracle, scanner, kill switch). Exchange-agnostic — pair with @polymarket (or another exchange skill) for opportunity playbooks.
